    S

    saveGameResult(GameResult) - Method in interface it.polimi.Game.Persistence.GameResultRepository
    Stores the given match result.
    saveGameResult(GameResult) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.MySqlGameResultRepository
    Persists the final match result and player scores into the MySQL database.
    saveGameResult(GameResult) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.NoOpGameResultRepository
    No-op implementation of saveGameResult that does not persist any data.
    sendAction(ActionMessage) - Method in interface it.polimi.Network.RMI.GameServiceRemote
    Sends a player action to the game controller.
    sendAction(ActionMessage) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiGameService
    Receives and processes action messages sent by RMI clients.
    sendToClient(SerializedUpdate) - Method in interface it.polimi.Network.Server.ClientConnection
    Pushes an update to the remote client.
    sendToClient(SerializedUpdate) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.ClientHandler
    Forwards a serialized game update to the client via the VirtualView.
    sendToClient(SerializedUpdate) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiClientConnection
    Sends a game update to the remote client.
    sendUpdate(SerializedUpdate) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiVirtualView
    Sends a structured update to the remote callback.
    SerializedUpdate - Class in it.polimi.Network.Common
    Represents a structured update or notification sent from the server to the client.
    SerializedUpdate() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Common.SerializedUpdate
    Default constructor.
    SerializedUpdate(String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Common.SerializedUpdate
    Constructs a new SerializedUpdate with the specified parameters.

    The main entry point for the Mesos server.

    Updates the player's online status.

    Sets the secret PIN for this player.

    Sets the PIN associated with this message.

    Marks a player as offline in the game model.

    Sets the room ID associated with this message.

    Shaman - Class in it.polimi.Characters
    Represents a Shaman character in the game.

    Constructs a Shaman character with the specified properties.
    SHAMAN - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.CharacterType
    Specialized in spiritual stars.
    ShamanicRitual - Class in it.polimi.Events
    Represents a Shamanic Ritual event in the game Mesos.

    Constructs a ShamanicRitual event with specified era, position, and scoring parameters.
    showLoginResult(boolean, String) - Method in interface it.polimi.Game.Core.GameView
    Displays the outcome of a nickname registration or login attempt.
    showLoginResult(boolean, String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiClientConnection
    Sends login outcome to the client.
    showLoginResult(boolean, String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiVirtualView
    Informs the client of the login outcome.
    showLoginResult(boolean, String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.View.VirtualView
    Informs the client of the outcome of their login request.
    showMessage(String) - Method in interface it.polimi.Game.Core.GameView
    Displays a generic message or notification to the user.
    showMessage(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiClientConnection
    Sends a controller response to the client.
    showMessage(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiVirtualView
    Sends a notification message to the client.
    showMessage(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.View.VirtualView
    Sends a generic, non-state-critical notification to the client.
    shutdown() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.Lobby
    Stops the background monitor thread.
    start() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiServerAdapter
    Starts registry/service export and binds the remote game service.
    start(String, int, String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.RmiClientAdapter
    Starts the RMI client using standard System.in for commands.
    start(String, int, String, InputStream) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.RmiClientAdapter
    Starts the RMI client using a custom input stream.
    start(Stage) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.ClientGuiMain
    Initializes the JavaFX stage and builds all GUI scenes.
    startTurnTimer(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.GameController
    Starts a thinking timer for the specified player.
    statusSnapshot() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.GameController
    Returns a status payload meant for UI/network synchronization.
    stop() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.ClientGuiMain
    Releases networking resources when the JavaFX application stops.
    stop() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiServerAdapter
    Unbinds the service and shuts down the registry if owned.
    Sustenance - Class in it.polimi.Events
    Represents a Sustenance event in the game Mesos.
    Sustenance(Era, Position, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Events.Sustenance
    Constructs a Sustenance event with specified era, position, and cost parameters.
    SUSTENANCE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.EventType
    Event related to food consumption and tribe survival.
